title: Ultra Nutty Indian Asparagus Chana Masala
description: A fluffy, nutty, halal-friendly chana masala featuring tender white asparagus for a comforting sick‑day dish.

ingredients.name: white asparagus
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in the Lazy Susan spinner until shimmering, then add cumin seeds and let them pop.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent and fragrant.
Stir in the diced tomatoes, turmeric, coriander, and garam masala, cooking for 3 minutes until tomatoes soften.
Mix in the peanut butter, chickpeas, and white asparagus until all pieces are coated in the sauce.
Pour in the vegetable broth, stir, cover, and set the Lazy Susan spinner to low heat for 20 minutes.
After 20 minutes, check for tenderness and pour the sauce into a serving bowl.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.
Serve hot with steamed rice or naan for a wholesome meal.
